inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 diluted EPS $6.66 less ~4% normalization haircut = $6.4/sh; regulated utility uses earnings power not OCF $6.9B less investing $11.9B
inputs.normalization_note: Regulated utility: Lawrence uses normalized owner earnings per share, not raw OCF minus capex. Heavy 2026-2030 capex ($72B plan) is recovered through rate base with regulatory lag.

bear.notes: Regulatory lag, affordability caps, equity dilution at top of $5.6B plan

base.notes: Rate-base CAGR from $72B capital plan; dividend payout ~56% on normalized earnings

bull.notes: Faster data-center load growth, constructive transmission ROEs, minimal dilution

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Regulated rate base on balance sheet; no land-at-cost pattern

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: $72B capital plan and data-center load pipeline flow through rate-base growth

option_scan.question: Embedded product option in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: 10-K large-load category includes data centers; separate data_center_load_option component

growth_explanation.mechanism: Allowed return on $72B 2026-2030 capital plan (transmission, distribution, generation) recovered through state trackers and FERC formula rates; data-center load adds incremental rate-base growth
growth_explanation.bear_falsifier: Operating EPS growth falls below 3% for four consecutive quarters with rising equity issuance
growth_explanation.bull_falsifier: Large-load interconnections exceed management plan with constructive ROE orders in key states

component_valuation.coverage_statement: Four additive components map regulated owner-cash engine, data-center load option, net financial claims, and regulatory execution reserve once each.

components.label: Regulated wires and generation owner-cash engine

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from AEP/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260212_rpt20251231_acc0000004904_26_000013.htm: FY2025 revenue $21.9B, OCF $6.9B, diluted EPS $6.66, debt $47.7B; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

inputs.label: FY2025 net income available to common shareholders
FY2025 net cash provided by operating activities
FY2025 weighted average diluted shares outstanding

assumptions.label: Normalized regulated owner earnings per diluted share
assumptions.rationale: FY2025 diluted EPS $6.66 less ~4% haircut for weather and regulatory timing [Assumption]; regulated utilities recover capex through rate base rather than raw OCF minus capex.

assumptions.label: Growth years 1–5
assumptions.rationale: Rate-base CAGR from $72B 2026-2030 capital plan recovered through trackers and formula rates.

assumptions.label: Growth years 6–7
assumptions.rationale: Fade after initial transmission and generation build wave.

assumptions.label: Required return on owner cash
assumptions.rationale: Regulated utility cost of equity band; not the stance gate.

assumptions.label: Selling multiple in year 7
assumptions.rationale: Utility earnings-power multiples 14× / 17× / 18× on year-7 owner cash.

assumptions.label: Component schedule adjustment factor
assumptions.rationale: Preserves component schedule while filing facts anchor FY2025 owner earnings.

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from AEP/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260212_rpt20251231_acc0000004904_26_000013.htm: FY2025 revenue $21.9B, OCF $6.9B, diluted EPS $6.66, debt $47.7B; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

source.locator: MD&A: approximately $72 billion five-year capital plan focused on transmission, distribution, and new generation

assumptions.label: Risk-adjusted data-center and large-load interconnection upside
assumptions.rationale: Non-overlapping claim on incremental load growth (data centers, crypto, industrial) beyond base rate-base recovery embedded in regulated owner-cash engine.

driver_model.timing_basis: Large-load interconnections convert to rate-base over 3-5 years.

components.label: Net debt and liquidity claims on common equity

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from AEP/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260212_rpt20251231_acc0000004904_26_000013.htm: FY2025 revenue $21.9B, OCF $6.9B, diluted EPS $6.66, debt $47.7B; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

assumptions.label: Net financial claim on common equity after consolidated debt
assumptions.rationale: Filing-locked cash less total debt carrying amount; low stresses refinancing and ATM dilution.

components.label: Regulatory lag, affordability, and dilution reserve

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from AEP/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260212_rpt20251231_acc0000004904_26_000013.htm: FY2025 revenue $21.9B, OCF $6.9B, diluted EPS $6.66, debt $47.7B; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

inputs.label: FY2025 net cash used in investing activities (capex proxy)
Planned equity issuance under ATM and capital plan (management disclosure)

source.locator: MD&A: approximately $5.6 billion equity issuance expected; $3.5B available under ATM program

assumptions.label: Regulatory lag, affordability, and execution stress reserve
assumptions.rationale: Negative reserve for rate-case delays, customer-bill affordability pushback, and equity dilution from $72B capital plan not fully embedded in base owner-cash path.

calculations.label: Regulatory and execution reserve per share

trigger.policy: A complete economic-value analysis is required when any trigger fires; otherwise it is recommended.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of AEP, including regulated owner-cash engine, data-center load option, net financial claims, and regulatory execution reserve.
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Regulated engine valued through owner-cash discount on normalized FY2025 earnings; net debt and regulatory reserve are separate overlap keys.

economic_value_analysis.accounting_reference: FY2025 10-K: stockholders' equity $31.1B; economic value uses normalized owner cash ($6.4/sh), not GAAP book alone.

component_groups.label: Regulated wires and generation owner-cash engine
component_groups.valuation_basis: Owner-cash discount on FY2025 normalized EPS per diluted share.
component_groups.adjustments: 4% normalization haircut on reported $6.66 EPS for weather/regulatory timing.

component_groups.label: Data-center and large-load interconnection option
component_groups.economic_claim: Incremental load growth beyond base rate-base plan
component_groups.valuation_basis: Risk-adjusted milestone value on large-load upside.
component_groups.adjustments: Not in Lawrence base owner-cash path; 10-K cites data centers in large-load category.

risk_and_timing.probability_basis: Base ~35% that large-load pipeline exceeds plan; low case zero.
risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Interconnections convert to rate-base over 3-5 years per capital plan.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Funded through regulated capex recovery and planned equity issuance.

component_groups.label: Net debt and liquidity claims on common equity
component_groups.valuation_basis: Net asset value on filing-locked debt carrying amount less cash.

component_groups.label: Regulatory lag, affordability, and dilution reserve
component_groups.economic_claim: Rate-case delay, bill affordability, and equity dilution stress
component_groups.valuation_basis: Bounded negative reserve; not full enterprise value haircut.
component_groups.adjustments: Partial dhando: $5.6B equity plan and $72B capex create execution tail.

valuation_proof.evidence: Primary bridge from AEP/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260212_rpt20251231_acc0000004904_26_000013.htm: FY2025 revenue $21.9B, OCF $6.9B, diluted EPS $6.66, debt $47.7B; contract backfill 2026-07-21.

total_return_panel.error: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.
total_return_panel.return_contract: split-adjusted close excluding dividends; event amounts normalized for later splits; cash reinvested at ex-date close; pre-tax nominal

component_review_queue.decision_rule: Each assigned rater records accept, challenge, or reject with a proposed range and evidence. The aggregator may not silently average disputed ranges.

items.label: Regulated wires and generation owner-cash engine
mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?
Is the security's ownership claim and economic-unit denominator reconciled correctly?
Does the evidence support the low/base/high range and its timing?
Are comparable assets truly like-for-like after production, contract, location, capital, ownership, and realization adjustments?
For an option, are success probability, time to realization, and remaining owner-funded capital explicit?
Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?
What observation would move the base estimate materially?

valuation_method_route.label: Predictable cash-flow security
failure_modes: contract renewal or regulatory reset ignored
valuation_method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

method_route.label: Predictable cash-flow security
failure_modes: contract renewal or regulatory reset ignored
method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.

paths.label: Growth theory (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Cross-check names dated catalyst with timeline

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

insider_signal.disclaimer: Context only. Insider activity informs scenario confidence and stance discussion; it does not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

scenario_confidence.note: Scenario weights are qualitative confidence only; Lawrence base IRR unchanged.

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].
